Off Calendar Feb-09-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Ruiz of The Cartwright Law Firm telephone number 415-433-0444 appearing specially for Plaintiff on behalf of Attorney Sue Holland.
Sierra Arballo of Philip M. Andersen & Associates telephone number 925-225-6838 specially appearing by telephone for Defendant Ashley Walrath.

The Court noted that no opposition was filed. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ASHLEY WALRATH'S Motion To Dismiss Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
